Zhu, Jiner (2546) - Woodward, Andy (2635)
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.05.04
B90 Sicilian, Najdorf

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 a6 6.Bd3 e5 7.Nde2 Nc6 8.O-O Be6 9.Kh1 Rc8 10.Nd5 Bxd5 11.exd5 Nb4 12.Bf5 Rc7 13.Nc3 g6 14.Bh3 Rc4 15.f4 e4 16.a3 Rxc3 17.bxc3 Nbxd5 18.c4 Ne7 19.Rb1 Bg7 20.Rxb7 O-O 21.Bb2 Nc6 22.Bxf6 Qxf6 23.Qd5 Nd8 24.Rb3 Re8 25.Re3 Qb2 26.Rxe4 Rxe4 27.Qxe4 Bf6 28.Qd3 a5 29.Qxd6 Kg7 30.g4 h6 31.Bg2 Qc3 32.Qd3 Qb2 33.f5 g5 34.c5 Qe5 35.c6 Be7 36.Qe4 Qc5 37.Qxe7
